'''Bevell Three''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bevell system/Legends|Bevell system]]. [[Jai Raventhorn]] led a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] team to this planet to [[Mission to Bevell Three|capture]] four [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents, but the mission was compromised: only Jai escaped. The four [[Infiltrators/Legends|Infiltrators]] commandos who died included [[Leong]]. As a propaganda measure rather than a reward, Jai was promoted to [[Master Sergeant/Legends|Master Sergeant]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Notes==
Bevell was a common name amongst male [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]].
